---
title: Explanation template
description: An understanding-oriented layout for architecture, context, and design decisions.
---

Use this layout when readers need to understand *why* something works the way it does — not just how to use it.

## The goal

Build a deeper conceptual understanding by exploring background context, architecture, intent, and high-level design decisions. It answers *why* something works the way it does, rather than just *how*.

## The tone

Discursive, expository, and educational.

## Recommended layout

### The concept

A high-level overview of the feature, architecture, or philosophy.

### How it works

Diagrams or text explaining the underlying mechanics, data flow, or system interactions.

### Design decisions

Clarification on why the system was built this way, alternative approaches, and specific trade-offs.
